title: schoenoplectus subterminalis
intro: Schoenoplectus subterminalis, also known as the subterminal cattail or subterminal tule, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Schoenoplectus subterminalis include its potential to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and cholesterol. Herbal preparations of Schoenoplectus subterminalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and rhizomes in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
